title: Fellowships
description: Discover Fellowships, prestigious opportunities for STEM Ph.D.s and military innovator to think beyond the impossible and create breakthrough technologies to solve national security challenges.
text:
This is where revolutionary science and technology ideas get pitched, tested, funded, launched, broken, and rebuilt.
Here, you芒聙聶ll scout the radical, the disruptive, and solve 芒聙聹DARPA hard芒聙聺 problems, working shoulder-to-shoulder with visionary technical office leadership and program managers who don芒聙聶t ask if something can be done, but how soon.
When the Fellowship ends, you become part of an acclaimed group of DARPA alumni where your connections follow you everywhere 芒聙聯 from the Pentagon to boardrooms to startups.
Shape Tomorrow
We offer three short-term, fast-paced, high-impact programs where you will contribute your expertise, learn from and collaborate with thinkers who believe anything is possible, and develop new skills to continue your career journey through space and time.
Come to the Washington, D.C., metro area to work on-site with some of the most brilliant minds in science and technology.
Innovation: Our Innovation Fellowship is an accelerated, highly selective program that starts with a one-year appointment, with the possibility of an additional one-year extension. It is open to college graduates and military professionals with STEM degrees.
Service Chiefs: Consider taking on a role that could help transform the battlefields of today and scout technologies for future ones. Become a critical link between revolutionary technological innovation and operational relevance in this 12-week opportunity for a select group of active-duty 0-4 to 0-5 military officers. You芒聙聶ll be embedded with program managers where you芒聙聶ll gain rare access to the agency芒聙聶s most advanced concepts.
Military: Serve as the connective tissue between defense research and real-world operations, guiding programs that enhance warfighter capability. Selected by your Service, this one-year program offers the opportunity to work alongside scientists, strategists, and engineers to help ensure the next great leap serves the mission.
You won芒聙聶t be just observing芒聙聰you芒聙聶ll contribute to transforming technology for national security. The future is being built. You芒聙聶re invited to help conceive it.
